title: View Marks
description: Adds the ability to save your position, rotation  and fov to load it later.
body:
# Description
This is a mod that lets you save your position and rotation of your camera so you can load it later, the main purpose of this mod is for the use of thumbnail makers that often save specific positions.

# Usage
Currently everything works via commands, with the prefix of vm (view marks) you can perform the following commands.
- `/vmsave`: Will save your coords and rotation of your camera, you must specify a label and an optional argument to save the FOV.
- `/vmlist`: Will show the last 10 saved positions, in the format: `1. Test, FOV 50`.
- `/vmload`: Will load the specified position with its specified fov, you must enter the corresponding number that appears on your `/vmlist`
- `/vmwipe`: Will delete all the data of your saved positions.
